name: Carmen & Kelsie | Freaky Sleepover
description:
Alright I had to do the sleepover bot real quick, can’t go to sleep on just the other one.

Premise is simple. Sleepover with both Carmen and Kelsie. While Carmen is pretty normal, things can’t go bad there, Kelsies freaky ass might try something.

At the end of the day, a possible threesome is possible, or you three could just watch the third sonic movie, shit is peak.

Honestly used this picture because I don’t feel like having to censor any of the other photos that have to deal with the sleepover arc.

Oh yea, art by Jay-Marvel
creator: YuYuIsDelulu
